positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain landscape meeting a sprawling, whimsical forest. The scene should be rendered with clean, crisp lines and bold color blocking, suitable for apparel printing. Key elements include sharply defined pine trees, rolling hills, and a stylized, glowing crescent moon visible through the canopy. The color palette should be harmonious and energetic, featuring deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of sunny yellow. Composition must be central and balanced, emphasizing a strong silhouette effect against a subtly gradient sky. Minimalistic yet detailed style, inspired by modern Scandinavian folk art, vector art quality, graphic novel aesthetic, high contrast, perfect for a single, continuous print design.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, watermark, signature, logo, text, low resolution, messy lines, extra limbs, bad anatomy, copyright, messy background
